creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
- Use XFCE master site macro, instead of one mirror.
- Add NLS (Native Language Support) option

Note: this port was tested with Xfce 4.8 (there are some adjustements to do), but target is Xfce 4.6.2 (which is a current version in ports tree).

Also in Mk/bsd.sites.mk, Xfce's mirrors are not up to date, I used Oliver's list (the maintainer of Xfce in ports tree).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
